Launcher.Error: Failed to open Combat Duel. Check the console.

Rules.HelpHtml:
COMBAT DUEL

Goal: inflict Wounds equal to the opponent's death threshold. It is 4 by default; Diehard raises it and Doomed lowers it.

Round: each duelist secretly sets 3 action slots and both sides resolve them simultaneously.

1. ACTIONS

  • Attack: selected weapon vs AC. Success deals 1 Wound, critical success deals 2 Wounds.
  • Defense: total defense. Hostile checks against the duelist are rolled with disadvantage: 2d20 and keep the lower result.
  • Maneuver: Athletics vs Fortitude, Acrobatics vs Reflex, Intimidation vs Will, Deception vs Perception. Success gives the target -2 AC next round, critical success also removes 1 action.

2. ACTION INTERACTION

  • Attack vs Defense: the attacker rolls with disadvantage.
  • Maneuver vs Attack: the maneuvering duelist takes -2 to the roll.
  • Maneuver vs Defense: the defense is broken and the defender's DC is reduced by 2.

3. MAP

Multiple attack penalty is tracked separately for Attack and for each Maneuver type: 0 / -4 / -8.
